stemHtml: The controller instructs you to "SQUAWK CHARLIE". What does that mean? The controller...

options.a: wants you to switch off your transponder.
options.b: is informing you that he/she can only determine your bearing within 10 degrees.
options.c: is requesting transmission of your pressure altitude from your transponder.
options.d: is unable to see your aircraft on his/her primary radar.
